require: Counted submission linked to test enrollment + week
No existing XP Event with Source Key for that submission (B1) OR known existing Event (B2)

automation_expected.B3: At most one shooting XP per enrollment per Denver day
automation_expected.B5: Week + XP activity date use normalized Denver key

cleanup: Retain XP Event for idempotency evidence OR soft-void with Duplicate Status if Mike approves cleanup
Do not delete unrelated enrollment XP
rollback: If duplicate Events created: mark extras Duplicate - Remove; file bug against 010
